prompt: A young Korean woman wears a blush swimsuit with a burnt orange silk scarf trailing behind her in golden hour wind. Close-up shot focused on her windblown hair and the warm rim light catching individual strands, soft desert bokeh in background. Vertical portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Render with photographic realism: subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Hair: subtle natural imperfection, individual strands catching warm light.
promptEn: A young Korean woman wears a blush swimsuit with a burnt orange silk scarf trailing behind her in golden hour wind. Close-up shot focused on her windblown hair and the warm rim light catching individual strands, soft desert bokeh in background. Vertical portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Render with photographic realism: subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Hair: subtle natural imperfection, individual strands catching warm light.
promptZh: 一位 年轻韩国女性 身穿 腮红粉色泳装，搭配一条 焦橙色丝巾 在黄金时刻的风中飘动。特写镜头聚焦于她被风吹乱的头发以及捕捉到发丝的温暖轮廓光，背景为柔和的沙漠虚化效果。竖向肖像构图，2:3 纵横比。采用摄影级写实渲染：阴影区域带有细微的 ISO 400 胶片颗粒感，避免过度平滑的 CG 质感。皮肤：具备次表面散射和微纹理。头发：呈现自然的细微瑕疵，发丝捕捉温暖光线。
